Not Of Mot To Consolodate And Dismiss Defs' Appeals Of The Orders,Decisions Or Awards Of The Labor Commissioner;Mp&As;Decl Of Rachel Folberg
Off Calendar Apr-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Susan A. Dovi, Esq. & Rachel Folberg, Esq. 703-4863 for pltfs/respondents & moving parties; Joel K. Belway, Esq. 788-1702 for defts/appellants & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court grants the motion to consolidate for all purposes under lead case number 405393 with the following case numbers included in instant motion: 404034, 404035, 404040/404039, 404047/404045, 404264, 404265, 404274, 404275, 404276, 404290, 404304; and with the following case numbers not subject to instant motion: 405393, 405396, 405407, 405413, 405402, 405399, 405398, 405410, 404271; all cases consolidated under #405393 per noticed motion and per court's own motion under CCP 1048, so stipulated by counsel. Ms. Dovi to prepare order. In addition, motion to dismiss is continued to 05/07/02 under #405393. Deft to file supplemental supporting papers re indigence by 04/25; response due 05/01. Ms. Dovi to prepare order.
